sections.heading: Age Calculator: What It Is and How to Use It
sections.content: An Age Calculator is a free online tool that quickly calculates a person’s exact age in years, months, and days based on their date of birth. It’s useful for students, parents, professionals, or anyone who needs a fast and accurate age calculation.

subSections.heading: Open the Calculator
subSections.content: Access it directly in your browser.

subSections.heading: Select Reference Date
subSections.content: Choose today’s date or any past/future date.

subSections.heading: Click Calculate
subSections.content: Instantly see the age in years, months, and days.

subSections.heading: Verify Output
subSections.content: Some calculators also show total days or weeks lived.

subSections.heading: Accurate
subSections.content: Accounts for leap years and varying month lengths.

subSections.heading: Mobile-Friendly
subSections.content: Works on smartphones, tablets, and desktops.

subSections.heading: Custom Date
subSections.content: Calculate age for any date in the past or future.

subSections.heading: Multiple Units
subSections.content: Optionally see age in years, months, days, or total days/weeks.

subSections.heading: Official Purposes
subSections.content: Estimate age for forms, applications, or ID verification.

subSections.heading: Event Planning
subSections.content: Keep track of birthdays, anniversaries, or eligibility dates.

subSections.heading: Education
subSections.content: Teach students about dates, time, and calendar differences.

subSections.heading: Example 1 – Current Age
subSections.content: Date of Birth: 15 March 1995 | Reference Date: Today | Result: 30 years, 8 months, 12 days

subSections.heading: Example 2 – Future Age
subSections.content: Date of Birth: 10 June 2000 | Reference Date: 1 January 2030 | Result: 29 years, 6 months, 22 days

faq.a: It calculates exact age in years, months, and days from a given date of birth.
Yes, it’s completely free to use.

faq.q: Do I need software or installation?
faq.a: No, it works directly in your browser.

faq.q: Can I use it on mobile devices?
Can I calculate age for a future or past date?
faq.a: Yes, you can select any reference date.

faq.q: Does it account for leap years?
faq.a: Yes, it accurately considers leap years and month lengths.

faq.q: Can it show total days or weeks?
faq.a: Some versions provide total days or weeks lived.
Yes, it’s simple and accurate for learning purposes.

faq.q: Can it be used for official documents?
faq.a: It’s good for estimates, but official documents require proof like a birth certificate.
It provides precise calculations based on the standard Gregorian calendar.
